title: Senior Software Engineer - Accenture India Global Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Accenture India Global Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Accenture India Global Group are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Accenture India Global Group:
Accenture India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India Global Group!
